title: Salvies pvp pack
description: All the esentials for minecraft pvp made by VoicingCribus73.
body:
This is the minecraft pvp 1.9+ pack made by VoicingCribus73.

Adding all of the essentials for modern pvp such as **low shield**, **low fire**, **short swords**, **transparent inventory** and more!!

This pack is primary maid for all main modern pvp gamemodes(sword, cpvp, uhc etc.) but will propably release a 1.8 pvp version.

Thanks for reading.

_shoutout to Oculie for making the low shield pack, Haikis for the low fire and SuperAnt for making the remove black background from inventory pack!_

[Low shield pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-shield-pack)

[Low fire pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/low-on-fire)

[Remove dark background from inventory pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-dark-inventory-overlay)
